page: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highcpu-128 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 7B13 processors. It features 128 vCPUs across 64 physical cores with 2 threads per core, paired with 128 GB of RAM, yielding a 1.0 GB per core memory ratio. The CPU includes 32 KB L1d, 0.5 MB L2, and 32 MB L3 cache configurations, supporting hardware features such as AVX, AES, VAES, and SHA_NI. This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs.

In benchmark testing, the instance exhibits top-tier multi-core CPU performance, scoring 172613.68 in stress-ng multi-core and 89602.52 in PassMark CPU tests. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is highly efficient at 8132.17 GB/sec, while large block read and write speeds reach 263.09 GB/sec and 131.24 GB/sec respectively. Redis SET operations perform exceptionally well, achieving 120.13 million operations per second. However, memory-bound tasks and large-scale LLM text generation, such as 70B model text generation, show weaker relative performance due to the constrained memory-to-vCPU ratio.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the n2d-highcpu-128 offers high compute density for CPU-bound workloads without the added cost of excess memory or local storage. It is highly suitable for compute-heavy tasks such as ray tracing, software compilation, static web serving, and medium-scale LLM prompt processing. It is less suited for memory-intensive databases or large-scale LLM text generation.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highcpu-128 is a compute-optimized server featuring 128 vCPUs and 128 GB of RAM, powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 7B13 processors on the x86_64 architecture. With 64 physical cores and a 1.0 GB per core memory ratio, this instance is designed for high-density compute workloads. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmarks show top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional Redis SET operations at 120.13 million operations per second, and strong memory bandwidth. However, its low memory-to-vCPU ratio limits its effectiveness for memory-intensive applications and large LLM text generation. It is highly suited for software compilation, ray tracing, static web serving, and parallel CPU-bound processing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highcpu-128 is a compute-optimized server with 128 vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and AMD EPYC 7B13 processors, delivering top-tier multi-core CPU and Redis performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highcpu-128 features 128 vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and AMD EPYC processors, optimized for high-density compute workloads.
tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized virtual server featuring 128 AMD EPYC vCPUs for demanding parallel processing and multi-core workloads.
bullet_points: 128 vCPUs and 128 GB RAM powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 7B13 processors
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and high-speed Redis SET operations
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Optimized for software compilation, ray tracing, and static web serving
Constrained 1.0 GB per core memory ratio limits large-scale LLM text generation
